fields.name: Description
fields.default: Every piece passes through my hands dozens of times. There are no shortcuts in handwork — just patience, heat, and intention.

default.title: Material
default.description: It starts with ethically sourced metal — silver, gold, brass — chosen for the piece it will become.

default.title: Forming
default.description: Heated, hammered, bent, and shaped. Each strike is a decision. The metal remembers every one.

default.title: Joining
default.description: Soldering, riveting, weaving — the invisible work that makes a piece whole and wearable.

default.title: Finishing
default.description: Filed, sanded, polished or patinated. The surface is where my hand meets your skin.
